name: Conte Crayon
description: A hand-drawn comic style characterized by expressive conte crayon sketches. This style blends soft, flowing lines with rough, textured shading to create a vibrant and organic feel.

art_style.line_styles: No inked lines, only soft, flowing lines created with conte crayon.  Lines are often broken or sketchy to enhance the organic feel.
art_style.inking_tools: Conte crayon, with occasional use of graphite for depth and shading.
art_style.shading_style: Soft, crosshatched shading that builds texture and depth, complemented by areas of flat color to enhance contrast.
art_style.color_palette: Black, white, sanguine (redish-brown) and Bistre (dark brown).  Toothy paper texture to enhance the organic feel
art_style.spot_colors: colored paper in matte pastel colors can be used as background.
art_style.registration: Loose registration to allow for a natural, hand-drawn look without strict alignment.
art_style.lettering_style: Handwritten font style that mimics natural writing, varying in size and weight to match the tone of dialogue.

character_style.limb_proportions: Proportions are slightly exaggerated with long, thin limbs to enhance expressiveness.
character_style.anatomy_detail: Stylized anatomy with minimal muscular detail, focusing instead on gesture and movement.
character_style.eye_style: Large, expressive eyes with simple circular shapes to convey emotion.
character_style.nose_style: Simple, understated lines for noses, often just a small curve or dot.
character_style.mouth_style: Wide, expressive mouths that can shift to convey a range of emotions with minimal lines.
character_style.expression_exaggeration: High exaggeration for facial expressions to enhance comedic or dramatic effect.
character_style.silhouette_clarity: High clarity with strong outlines to ensure characters stand out against backgrounds.
character_style.silhouette_shape_language: Organic curves and fluid shapes that match the whimsical nature of the style.
character_style.detail_complexity: Moderate detail focused on facial expressions and key features, with simpler body shapes.
character_style.texture_accents: Subtle textures added with crayon strokes to suggest fabric and surfaces.
character_style.motion_line_style: Soft, swirling lines to indicate movement and action, enhancing the dynamic feel.
character_style.expression_line_style: Minimal use of emotional accent lines, focusing on facial expressions instead.
character_style.signature_motifs: Curvy, whimsical elements that reflect the playful nature of the style.
character_style.recurring_flourishes: Scribble-like accents around action or emotional moments, adding to the playful aesthetic.

chat.shape: Rounded rectangles with soft edges, reflecting the organic nature of the art style.
chat.border: Thin, hand-drawn outline that complements the sketchy aesthetic.
chat.fill_color: Light cream or pastel background to contrast with the text.
chat.font: Handwritten font that mimics the flow of speech.

whisper.shape: Slightly smaller rounded rectangles with a wavy edge for a gentle effect.
whisper.border: Fainter line, maintaining the hand-drawn feel.

shout.shape: Jagged, comic-style bursts to emphasize loudness.
shout.border: Thicker, bold outline to indicate intensity.
shout.fill_color: Bright yellow or red to grab attention.

thought.shape: Cloud-like shapes with a wispy tail.
thought.border: Soft, thin outline that merges with the fill color.
thought.fill_color: Pale blue or light gray for a dreamy effect.
thought.font: Italicized handwritten font to suggest inner thoughts.

sound_effect.fill_color: Bright colors like red or orange to convey energy.
sound_effect.font: Bold, stylized font that captures the sound's essence.

narration.border: Thin outline that matches the overall style.
